title: 9EssentialStepsImplementOpenCl
problem: OpenClaw acts as an orchestration and 自动化 layer that connects your AI models, 数据 pipelines, and external API into a cohesive 工作流. It supports popular frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, and HuggingFace Transformers through native plugins and CLI tools, allowing you to embed OpenClaw agents directly into your training, inference, or 数据 处理 pipelines. It also supports triggering 工作流 via webhooks, cron jobs, or event streams, making it 灵活 to fit into existing CI
